description: Disciplined, iron-clad goblinoids waging war with military precision and brutal efficiency.
subraces: Rank-and-file soldiers drilled from birth in phalanx tactics and siege warfare.
Spy-monks trained in stealth, illusion magic, and silent assassination.
War-mages channeling evocation spells to shatter enemy formations on the battlefield.
Gill-bearing raiders patrolling coastal waters and plundering seaside settlements.
Frost-hardened warriors campaigning across tundra and ambushing from blizzard cover.
